    "Missing hanger nails in designated connector holes",
    "Structural connector load capacity is compromised due to incomplete fastening"

    "Install approved hanger nails in all empty manufacturer-designated holes before framing inspection"

  "rationale": "Manufacturer instructions (Simpson Strong-Tie) and the IRC require all fastener holes in joist hangers and structural connectors to be filled with the specified nails or screws to achieve the rated design load. Missing fasteners compromise the structural integrity of the connection.",
